summary: El Consejo de Ministros da luz verde al procedimiento extraordinario sin consensuarlo con la UE y sin llevarlo al Congreso. Los sindicatos policiales esperan el colapso de las oficinas desde el lunes y temen un "efecto llamada". Leer

title: El TJUE allana el camino para que España tenga que convertir en fijos a los más de 800.000 interinos
summary: El tribunal con sede en Luxemburgo no obliga al país, pero determina que las medidas para compensar el abuso de la temporalidad no son acordes al derecho europeo, lo que deja la conversión en fijos o el incremento sustancial de las indemnizaciones como las más plausibles vía para cumplir. Leer

title: Foment convoca elecciones en mayo y Sánchez Llibre optará a un tercer mandato
summary: El presidente de la patronal catalana se presentará a los comicios con el foco puesto en la productividad, el absentismo y la fiscalidad. Leer

title: Spain’s Tenerife eyes first train line to tackle car congestion
summary: The local council in Tenerife are taking steps to begin a long-awaited train project on the island, with the popular Tenerife South–Reina Sofía Airport set for a stop to help limit car congestion in the area.

title: How the European job market will change with new pay transparency rules
summary: A new EU directive on pay transparency, which aims to ensure equality between men and women doing the same job, could transform the European job market by guaranteeing more rights to workers.

title: Spanish consulates struggle with over half a million citizenship applications
summary: Following the deadline for Spanish citizenship applications via the so-called 'Grandchildren's Law', Spain's consulates around the world are struggling to process the flood in applications.

title: Spanish PM's wife charged with corruption
summary: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez’s wife, Begoña Gómez , has been formally charged with corruption after a years-long criminal investigation, according to a court ruling published Monday.

title: What to know before buying a foreclosed home in Spain
summary: Buying a foreclosed home in Spain can have its advantages, but it's also a riskier option with several key factors you need to consider before making the purchase.
